original_image_tags: A handwritten letter on aged, off-white paper, showing a small brown tape stain on the left edge and two black ink blotches obscuring words in the first line. The handwriting is in blue ink.

elements.description: One small, rectangular, brown paper tape or label attached with adhesive tape on the left side of the handwritten letter. The label is blank and partially covered by the tape.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content of a handwritten letter with a brown tape or label on the left edge, but description A adds details (ink blotches, blue ink) not mentioned in B, with no contradiction.
